rules.rule: Always check measureCache before computing. Use the cache-before-assertNull pattern: check cache, return if cached, then compute and cache the result. See measureCache.ts for the caching API.
Never use exact equality for measurement results. Use toBeCloseTo(expected, precision) in tests. Measurement functions return numbers that may have floating-point imprecision from WASM.
Interference detection in interferenceFns.ts uses AABB pre-filtering for performance. Always check bounding box overlap before running expensive OCCT interference checks.
